home.pageTitle: Create your Social Profile or Business
home.welcome: Discover Local. Earn Rewards. Get Noticed.
home.info: Therr connects you with the people, places, and businesses in your community. Drop location-based posts, discover hidden gems nearby, and earn rewards just for exploring.
home.info2: Are you a local influencer or content creator? Partner with nearby businesses, grow your audience, and land collaborations — all through the app.
home.info3: Download the free app to unlock the full experience.

placeholders.title: A catchy title...

createProfile.tooManyAccounts: Users are limited to one of each account type (personal, creator, business)
createProfile.invalidCode: Code is invalid or expired. Try again or resend.
createProfile.info: We are dedicated to preventing fake users, so Multi-Factor Auth is a must. Requiring an e-mail and phone # along with geo-tag post requirements drastically limits the potential for fake users.

underConstruction.info: You must be looking for the mobile app! Find it below. For now, the desktop app only supports basic features like updating your password or account details.

goMobile.subtitle: Discover local people, places, and moments — right from your browser. Explore what's happening around you and connect with your community. Get the mobile app to enjoy all the fun on the go

explore.title: Explore Nearby
explore.description: Browse trending posts and discover what people are sharing in your area.

locations.title: Find Locations
locations.description: Search local businesses, events, and hidden gems near you.

moments.title: View Moments
moments.description: See photo and video moments shared by the community.

connect.title: Meet People
connect.description: Find and connect with people who share your interests nearby.

goMobile.ctaInfo: Love what you see? The mobile app takes it further — with real-time location discovery, push notifications, rewards, and more. Download for free and never miss what's happening around you.
